nasb.text: Now it is in my heart to make a covenant with the Lord God of Israel, that His burning anger may turn away from us.

esv.text: Now it is in my heart to make a covenant with the Lord, the God of Israel, in order that his fierce anger may turn away from us.

cnv.text: 現在我心中有意要和耶和華以色列的　神立約，好使他的震怒轉離我們。

ccb.text: 现在我决心要与以色列的上帝耶和华立约，好使祂的烈怒转离我们。
